ddls:
CREATE TABLE "breweries" (
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brewery */,
  "brewery_name" TEXT /* Name of the brewery */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the brewery */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the brewery is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the brewery is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the brewery is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the brewery */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the brewery */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brewery */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the brewery */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brewery was founded */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the brewery is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brewery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beers" (
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the beer */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the beer style */,
  "abv" REAL /* ABV of the beer */,
  "ibu" REAL /* IBU of the beer */,
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brewery that produces the beer */,
  "ounces" INTEGER /* Size of the beer in ounces */,
  "brew_date" TEXT /* Date the beer was first brewed */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the beer was released to the market */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the beer */,
  "label_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the beer label image */,
  "bottle_size" TEXT /* Size of the beer bottle (e.g., 12 oz, 16 oz) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beers_brewery_id FOREIGN KEY ("brewery_id") REFERENCES breweries ("brewery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beers_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "og" REAL /* Original gravity of the beer style */,
  "fg" REAL /* Final gravity of the beer style */,
  "srm" REAL /* Color of the beer style (SRM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the beer that uses this ingredient */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the ingredient used */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the ingredient */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the ingredient */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the ingredient */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is currently available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ingredients_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES beers ("beer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brewing_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brewing schedule */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the beer being brewed */,
  "brew_date" TEXT /* Date the beer was brewed */,
  "bottling_date" TEXT /* Date the beer was bottled */,
  "brewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brewer responsible for the schedule */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size of the brew */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the brewing schedule (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brewing_schedules_brewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("brewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brewing_schedules_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES beers ("beer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., brewery admin, brewer, customer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the beer being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review written by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "helpfulness" INTEGER /* Indicates how helpful other users found the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES beers ("beer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brewery that owns the inventory */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the beer in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the beer in the inventory */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the beer in days */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the beer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Storage location of the beer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES beers ("beer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_brewery_id FOREIGN KEY ("brewery_id") REFERENCES breweries ("brewery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "beer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the beer being recommended */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., based on user ratings) */,
  "recommended_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "rating_threshold" REAL /* Rating threshold that led to the recommendation */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Recommendation algorithm used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_beer_id FOREIGN KEY ("beer_id") REFERENCES beers ("beer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brewery related to the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news article (e.g., new product, event) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_brewery_id FOREIGN KEY ("brewery_id") REFERENCES breweries ("brewery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "registration_link" TEXT /* Link to register for the event */,
  "brewery_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brewery related to the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_brewery_id FOREIGN KEY ("brewery_id") REFERENCES breweries ("brewery_id")
)
